content: I am a final year Computer Science student, enthusiastic about programming and problem-solving. I love to make Android applications, regularly participate in coding competitions, and have a keen interest in Game Development. Looking for a job with an environment where I can advance my knowledge under the guidance of experts and gain real-world experience. Always ready to handle challenges and constantly try to enhance my skills by exploring new technologies.

content: Play Tic Tac Toe also, know as Noughts and Crosses on your Android phone. A simple version for everyone, and it’s completely free. The best way to pass your time. Tic ac Toe is an AI puzzle game which is the best way to train your brain.
summary: A fun pen paper game implemented for Android devices.
title: Tic Tac Toe

content:
• Implemented an Android chat application using Firebase.
• Integrated the latest Firebase’s, Cloud Firestore for the database.
• Also, added Firebase authentication to validate users.
Future release : Video calling feature.
title: Chat Room

content:
• Implementated a model for synthesizing images for text description using the GAN-CLS algorithm.
• Implementation is built on top of a DCGAN in PyTorch.
• The text descriptions were encoded using the CNN-RNN model and the DCGAN is trained on those text features.
Dataset Source: Caltech - UCSD Birds 200-2011
title: Text to image synthesis
My Internship Experience at go-mmt, Gurgaon-2019
